sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
That didn't work. Let me think about this more carefully.
So far, the only thing that changes the board is:
1. UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT - moves the blue squares
2. MOUSE on the left blue - shifts the HUD bars (inconsistent amounts: 1 or 2 pixels)
Maybe I need to think about what the goal is. The bars are at the top and bottom. The top bar has B on the left and W on the right. The bottom bar has W on the left and B on the right.
Looking at the background, the left side is yellow and the right side is orange. The black structure spans the middle.
Maybe the goal is to shift the bars until they match some target configuration. But what target?
Let me try clicking on the left blue many more times to see if the level completes at some point. I'll batch several clicks.
Actually, let me try a different approach. Maybe the goal is to make the bars all one color. Let me try clicking until B=0 or W=0.
But that would take many clicks. Let me try a different approach.
Maybe I should try clicking on the right blue again, but at a different position. Or maybe I need to move the right blue to the left side first.
Actually, let me try clicking on the black structure border. Let me look at the segmentation to find the black structure.
